span.p:
Thresholds
gapAlertPercent = 5
phase2SizeMin = 100
indicatorGAnnualSizeMin = 250
indicatorGTriennialSizeMin = 150
voluntarySizeMax = 50
mandatorySizeMin = 50

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Computations
phase2Required = workforce >= @phase2SizeMin ∧ indicatorGCalculated == true ∧ gap >= @gapAlertPercent
cseRequired = workforce >= @phase2SizeMin ∧ hasCse == true
indicatorGRequired = (workforce >= @indicatorGAnnualSizeMin ∨ workforce >= @indicatorGTriennialSizeMin ∧ workforce < @indicatorGAnnualSizeMin ∧ isTriennialYear == true)
